textByHashes.07c821006059417cf5547986fba926797b8fe077: Yes, that's my usual spot, but the Godfather said I should be here, so here I am.
textByHashes.2d413e9cdf8263d423a1bf9e3887584049689f5a: That you've been doodelling? If you don't mind I have a job to do, please stop distracting me.
textByHashes.5504ed6cad09ce1fb4754e133aa80537a5faaf45: No I don't and I'm trying to work here. Please stop distracting me!
textByHashes.1ef66113ab60ec5e329ede55cb3a77f8e21da01d: They look familiar, but I can't think where I've seen marks like that. Try asking around, maybe somebody else will recognise them.
textByHashes.155d62556206bd483991ff0f2c19188f9e897fb7: You mean my father? He went into retirement, I've taken over the family business instead.
textByHashes.eb4f794aae08f6f9333a99700396a17df024b5be: No, fortunately for me I inherited my good looks from my mother.
textByHashes.83b45efc335d327bef8967ddc31a0ea69e6cd8ee: Sorry, we cannot allow you to bring those sacks into the market for security reason.
textByHashes.c53cfa35f804014418326ddc2a88cfe5e074c879: You may not pass through this door without paying the trading tax.
textByHashes.1bd6195b47484016d3b289fadaa5c7370c6965cf: Not at all. Those are the rules.
textByHashes.fdaf53dbc80b99edf239c9db1e4dabf7f30e955b: Ever heard of fairylights? Well how do you think we make 'em? First we collect a pile of gems and then we get a spider to spin 'em into a long web, we light the jewels by imbuing each one with a little bit of magic.
textByHashes.7524b9d18465b09a972fdb18b9b06453eec8ca0d: That's right, how else could we make 'em twinkle so beautifully?
textByHashes.c85cf7e88e4db0c894639050710c14d21e839693: Hello, did you just come from the market gates? Are my brothers doing their job well? I do worry that they'll start letting people into the market for free without me being there to supervise them!
